metadata.title: Customs Clearance | Customs Brokerage & Logistics in Panama
metadata.description: Full-service customs brokerage and logistics in Panama. Import, export, transit, nationalization, cold chain, and more.

hero.title: Customs & Logistics Solutions in Panama.
hero.subtitle: From import and export to transit and nationalization — we handle everything so your cargo moves without delays.

services.title: Complete customs & logistics solutions.
services.subtitle: From documentation to delivery, we handle every step of your international trade operations.

customsClearance.title: Customs Clearance
customsClearance.description: Full import and export documentation, tariff classification, and regulatory compliance.

nationalizations.title: Nationalizations
nationalizations.description: Complete nationalization process for goods entering Panama's customs territory.

reexports.title: Re-exports & Transit
reexports.description: Temporary imports, re-export procedures, and in-transit cargo management.

seaFreight.title: Sea Freight
seaFreight.description: FCL and LCL ocean freight from any port worldwide to Panama.

airFreight.title: Air Freight
airFreight.description: Express and standard air cargo services with full customs handling.

coldChain.title: Cold Chain
coldChain.description: Temperature-controlled logistics for perishables and pharmaceuticals.

custody.title: Custody of Valuables
custody.description: Secure handling and storage for high-value and sensitive cargo.

liveAnimals.title: Live Animals
liveAnimals.description: Specialized permits and logistics for live animal imports and exports.

howItWorks.title: How it works.
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to delivery in five simple steps.

quote.title: Request a quote
quote.description: Tell us about your cargo and we'll provide a detailed quote.

logistics.title: We coordinate logistics
logistics.description: We arrange pickup, freight, and all documentation.

arrival.title: Cargo arrives in Panama
arrival.description: We receive your shipment and begin customs processing.

clearance.title: Customs clearance
clearance.description: Full nationalization, permits, and regulatory compliance.

distribution.title: Ready for distribution
distribution.description: Cargo released and ready for pickup or last-mile delivery.

routes.title: From anywhere to Panama.
routes.subtitle: We handle customs and logistics for cargo arriving from all major trade routes worldwide.

imports.title: Imports
imports.description: Full customs clearance for goods entering Panama

exports.title: Exports
exports.description: Documentation and compliance for outbound cargo

transit.title: Transit
transit.description: In-transit cargo through Panama's free zones

contact.title: Tell us about your shipment.
contact.subtitle: We'll come back with a quote and a recommended route within 24 hours.

form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your shipment needs, product types, frequency, etc.

success.title: Message sent!
success.message: Thank you for your inquiry. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with a quote and recommended route.

contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

footer.description: Full-service customs brokerage and logistics solutions for cargo arriving in Panama from anywhere in the world.
